codeReview.summary: The display-cross-area feature adds 13 comprehensive cross-area integration tests that verify cross-command consistency across the display & dynamics milestone. The tests are well-structured, properly documented, and cover all required validation assertions (VAL-CROSS-001, 002, 005, 008). All tests pass, code follows project conventions, and the implementation properly handles edge cases like JSON schema differences between tree and show commands.

summary: PASS: The display-cross-area feature is fully implemented and tested. 13 integration tests cover lifecycle dynamics evolution, tree operations with reparenting, JSON schema consistency between commands, and multiple roots handling. All 286 werk tests and 313 sd-core tests pass. Code follows established patterns from previous features, with clear test documentation and proper use of assert_cmd and serde_json for integration testing. No shared state gaps identified.
